finding_results.notes: Inserted explicit interior beats in both target dialogue-heavy spans, breaking long external-only runs while preserving scene pace and leverage shifts.

Retained all key financial numbers ($480, $160, ~$95, $225) but restructured the beat around a boxed calculation plus concrete relational consequence tied to Nora and June, shifting texture away from pure ledger repetition.
Replaced the recurring 'almost told/said' suppression formula with a failed-start physical hesitation and interrupted speech under pressure.

summary: Revised chapter 10 to resolve all packet findings by restoring close-third interior anchoring in dialogue-heavy stretches, varying the end-of-chapter accounting cognition with embodied relational consequence, and removing the repeated suppression template while preserving continuity facts, character voice, and heading contract.
